# Aesthetica Dental Clinic — Punawale, Pune

> Multispeciality dental clinic led by Dr. Prachi Gupta Garg (BDS, Certified Cosmetologist).
> Located in Punawale, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Pune – 411033, Maharashtra, India.
> Phone: +91 92266 80164
> Website: https://aestheticadental.github.io/

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://aestheticadental.github.io/): Overview of all services, doctor profile, FAQ, contact
- [Root Canal Treatment in Punawale](https://aestheticadental.github.io/root-canal-punawale.html): Painless RCT using rotary endodontics
- [Dental Implants in Punawale](https://aestheticadental.github.io/dental-implants-punawale.html): Permanent tooth replacement
- [Clear Aligners in Punawale](https://aestheticadental.github.io/aligners-punawale.html): Invisible orthodontic treatment
- [Teeth Whitening in Punawale](https://aestheticadental.github.io/teeth-whitening-punawale.html): Professional in-clinic whitening
- [Veneers & Crowns in Punawale](https://aestheticadental.github.io/veneers-punawale.html): Porcelain veneers and dental crowns
- [Paediatric Dentist in Punawale](https://aestheticadental.github.io/paediatric-dentist-punawale.html): Gentle dental care for children
- [Root Canal Cost Guide 2026](https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/cost-of-root-canal-in-punawale.html): Pricing breakdown
- [7 Signs You Need Root Canal](https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/signs-you-need-root-canal.html): Symptoms guide
- [Best Dentist Near Wakad vs Punawale](https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/best-dentist-near-wakad.html): Local comparison guide

## Services Offered

Root canal treatment (RCT), dental implants, clear aligners, traditional braces,
porcelain veneers, dental crowns, professional teeth whitening, teeth cleaning
(scaling & polishing), paediatric dentistry, restorative dentistry (composite
fillings, inlays, onlays), cosmetic dentistry.

## Lead Dentist

Dr. Prachi Gupta Garg
- Qualification: BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery)
- Additional: Certified Cosmetologist
- Registered with the Dental Council of India (DCI)
- Specialises in: cosmetic dentistry, endodontics (root canal), orthodontics, paediatric dentistry
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/prachi-gupta-0b67a9190/

## Catchment Area

Primary: Punawale (Pune 411033)
Also serving: Wakad, Tathawade, Ravet, Hinjewadi (Phases 1/2/3), Pimpri-Chinchwad (PCMC)
Travel time from Wakad: ~10–15 min | From Hinjewadi IT Park: ~15–20 min

## Pricing (Approximate — contact clinic for exact quote)

- Root Canal Treatment: ₹3,500 – ₹8,000 (varies by tooth and number of canals)
- Dental Implants: ₹25,000 – ₹45,000 per tooth (titanium implant + crown)
- Clear Aligners: ₹60,000 – ₹1,20,000 (full course, both arches)
- Porcelain Veneers: ₹8,000 – ₹15,000 per tooth
- Teeth Whitening: ₹4,000 – ₹8,000
- Teeth Cleaning / Scaling: ₹800 – ₹1,500
- Dental Consultation: ₹200 – ₹500 (adjusted against treatment)
- Payment accepted: Cash, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), Debit/Credit Card, EMI on select treatments

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is root canal treatment painful?**
At Aesthetica Dental Clinic in Punawale, root canal treatment is performed under local anaesthesia and is virtually painless. Most patients find it more comfortable than a tooth extraction. Any mild soreness afterward resolves within 1–2 days.

**How many sittings does root canal treatment take?**
Most root canals at Aesthetica are completed in 1–2 appointments of 45–60 minutes each, depending on the complexity and number of canals.

**How much does root canal treatment cost in Punawale?**
Root canal costs at Aesthetica range from ₹3,500 to ₹8,000. Front teeth (fewer canals) cost less; molars cost more. A precise estimate is provided during the consultation.

**How much do dental implants cost in Pune?**
Dental implants at Aesthetica cost ₹25,000 – ₹45,000 per tooth including the crown. Cost depends on bone density, implant brand, and crown type.

**Are clear aligners better than traditional braces?**
Clear aligners are nearly invisible, removable and comfortable — best for mild-to-moderate cases. Traditional braces suit complex alignment. Dr. Prachi recommends the right option after examining your teeth.

**Is Aesthetica Dental Clinic open on Sundays?**
Yes. The clinic is open every day — Monday through Sunday — from 10:15 AM to 8:30 PM, including public holidays.

**Do you treat children?**
Yes. Aesthetica offers gentle paediatric dentistry for children of all ages. Early visits (from age 3–5) are recommended to build healthy oral habits and prevent cavities.

**How far is Aesthetica from Wakad?**
Approximately 10–15 minutes by road from Wakad, making Aesthetica the closest quality dental clinic for Wakad residents.

**How far is the clinic from Hinjewadi?**
Approximately 15–20 minutes from Hinjewadi IT Park Phases 1, 2 and 3.

**Do you accept UPI and card payments?**
Yes. Cash, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), and Debit/Credit Cards are all accepted. EMI available on select treatments.
